label: AutoML & automated model design

node.label: AutoML & automated model design
node.definition: AutoML treats preprocessing, model choice, hyperparameters, data policy, or architecture as a design space optimized by an automated controller.
node.why_it_matters: It replaces ad hoc trial-and-error with reproducible search under a declared objective, budget, and constraint set.
limitations: Results are limited by the search space, proxy metric, compute budget, and validation leakage.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, AutoML & automated model design has a `uses` dependency on Optimization theory because Optimization theory is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, AutoML & automated model design has an `uses` dependency on Active learning & curriculum learning with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, AutoML & automated model design has a `trained_under` dependency on Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, AutoML & automated model design has a `trained_under` dependency on Meta-learning with `common` strength.

sentence_units.text: AutoML treats preprocessing, model choice, hyperparameters, data policy, or architecture as a design space optimized by an automated controller.
It replaces ad hoc trial-and-error with reproducible search under a declared objective, budget, and constraint set.
Results are limited by the search space, proxy metric, compute budget, and validation leakage.
In this atlas graph, AutoML & automated model design has a `uses` dependency on Optimization theory because Optimization theory is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, AutoML & automated model design has an `uses` dependency on Active learning & curriculum learning with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, AutoML & automated model design has a `trained_under` dependency on Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, AutoML & automated model design has a `trained_under` dependency on Meta-learning with `common` strength.
